title: mentha mollissima var. undulata
intro: Mentha mollissima var. undulata, also known as the Chinese peppermint or wrinkled mint, is a type of plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mentha mollissima var. undulata include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce nausea and headaches, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
